series_metadata.series_description: Electronic or textual records created to control or monitor individual access to a system and its data created for security purposes, including but not limited to user account records, security logs, and password files.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
